decisions.decision: Sidebar shows only Bug Report + Sprint (no Dashboard link)
decisions.rationale: Explicit user request: 'Display only Bug report page and Sprint page'
Required to center logo on mobile when hamburger present, without JS

decisions.decision: Logo click triggers exit animation then navigates to /dashboard via onLogoClick prop
decisions.rationale: Allows pages to run fadeOutUp before navigating; cleaner than intercepting anchor

decisions.decision: Removed margin-top 64px from layout divs in BugReport/Sprint/Dashboard
decisions.rationale: position:sticky takes space in normal flow — the old fixed-nav margin was no longer needed

decisions.decision: Bug report docx: dual donut charts side by side + stats table (from previous session)
decisions.rationale: User requested docx match page visual

decisions.decision: Sprint docx: colored card table per sprint, no donut charts (from previous session)
decisions.rationale: User explicitly rejected charts for sprint — card rows match sprint page visual

next_action: Restart frontend container, open browser, verify: (1) no gap between navbar and sidebar, (2) mobile hamburger collapses sidebar, (3) logo centered on mobile, (4) page transitions animate. Then continue page-level responsive improvements.
